summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FunGame foundation gate. Backend: 39/39 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Successfully tested player flows, games display, chip system, announcements, notifications, and settings. All core features working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Announcements page shows 0 announcements in data-testid count but displays 3 announcements visually (including pinned one). The query selector may not be finding items correctly, but announcements are rendering properly.
Notifications page shows 0 notifications in data-testid count for pre-seeded player. This is expected as the seeded player has no notifications initially.

passed_tests: Backend: Register new user with dev_code in response (200)
Backend: Admin approve user - sets ACTIVE + 1000 welcome chips (200)
Backend: GET /games returns exactly 18 games all COMING_SOON (200)
Backend: Admin approve chip request - credits balance + ledger (200)
Backend: Player access restored after maintenance (200)
Backend: No payment routes exist - all return 404
Frontend: Welcome page loads with disclaimer visible
Frontend: Chip balance visible in header (5,000)
Frontend: Disclaimer visible in app header
Frontend: Games page shows 18 game cards
Frontend: All 18 games have COMING_SOON badges
Frontend: 'Coming soon' play button clickable (shows expected message)
Frontend: Chips page balance card shows correct balance
Frontend: Request and History tabs present
Frontend: Chip request appears in history with PENDING status
Frontend: Announcements page shows 3 announcements with pinned first
Frontend: Settings toggles work (reduced motion, high contrast)
Frontend: Search page accessible and shows all 18 games
Frontend: Disclaimer visible in admin topbar

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major flows working, minor data-testid selector issue with announcements count)

additional_notes.email_verification: Email verification in DEMO MODE works correctly - dev_code is returned in API response and displayed on screen
additional_notes.games_status: All 18 games correctly show COMING_SOON status and are non-playable (409 response) - this is expected foundation gate behavior
additional_notes.chip_system: Server-authoritative chip system working correctly with ledger entries and admin approval flow
additional_notes.maintenance_mode: Maintenance mode tested via backend API - players blocked with 503, admins retain access
additional_notes.no_payments: Confirmed no payment/deposit/withdraw/cashout routes exist (all return 404)
additional_notes.disclaimers: PLAY CHIPS — NO CASH VALUE disclaimer visible on welcome page, app header, and admin topbar as required
